parameters.name: search_pages
parameters.description: Search for pages in Notion by title. Parameter: query (required, search term to match against page titles)

parameters.name: read_page
parameters.description: Read the content of a Notion page. Returns the page title and content as markdown. Parameter: page_id (required, the page UUID from search_pages)

parameters.name: create_page
parameters.description: Create a new page in Notion. Parameters: title (required, page title), content (markdown content or empty string), parent_id (parent page UUID or empty string for first available page)

value.title: ={{ $fromAI('title', 'Page title', 'string') }}
value.content: ={{ $fromAI('content', 'Markdown content for the page or empty string', 'string') }}

schema.description: Parent page UUID or empty string
